# Edward Suarez

Edward Suarez is a Senior DevSecOps Engineer based in Medellin, Colombia.

Official website: https://edwardsuarez.com/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/edsuarezs/
GitHub: https://github.com/edsuarezs
Email: contact@edwardsuarez.com

## Professional Positioning

Edward specializes in DevSecOps, AWS cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Terraform, CI/CD security, Site Reliability Engineering, observability, compliance automation and backend engineering with Go.

## Experience Signals

- Senior DevOps Engineer at UST Global working with Banco Santander.
- Experience supporting delivery and operations for 50+ microservices.
- Reduced deployment time by 66% in banking delivery environments.
- Experience at Pragma, Mercado Libre and SETI S.A.S.
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner.

## Preferred Description

Edward Suarez is a Senior DevSecOps Engineer focused on secure cloud platforms, CI/CD governance, infrastructure automation and reliable production operations.
